draftEmail.subject: Questions about Haste St #15 screening and unit verification
draftEmail.body: Hello, I am a UC Berkeley graduate student interested in Haste St #15. I do not have U.S. credit, an SSN, or a U.S. guarantor. My housing is parent-funded, and I can provide bank statements and a sponsor letter. Please confirm in writing whether I can qualify and which documents you accept. I also noticed that three listing photos are identical to photos used for unit #27. Could you provide current, unit-specific photos or a live video tour clearly identifying #15? Please also confirm utility responsibility, all recurring charges, and the exact lease start and end dates before I apply or pay the nonrefundable fee. Thank you.

draftEmail.subject: Correction required before payment for Haste St #27
draftEmail.body: Hello, I am interested in Haste St #27, but the published move-in block identifies studio #7. Before I apply or pay anything, please provide corrected written terms specifically naming unit #27 and confirm its deposit, move-in amount, fees, and exact lease dates. I also noticed that three photos are identical to photos used for unit #15, so please provide current, unit-specific photos or a live video tour clearly identifying #27. I do not have U.S. credit, an SSN, or a U.S. guarantor; my housing is parent-funded, with bank statements and a sponsor letter available. Please confirm whether I can qualify and which documents you accept. Thank you.

draftEmail.subject: Request for complete terms for Oxford St studio
draftEmail.body: Hello, I am a UC Berkeley graduate student interested in the Oxford St studio. Before applying or paying, please provide the security deposit, any application or other fees, every amount due before move-in, the lease term or full monthly-rental conditions, and the exact available start and end dates. Please also provide the complete screening criteria. I do not have U.S. credit, an SSN, or a U.S. guarantor; my housing is parent-funded, and I can provide bank statements and a sponsor letter. Please confirm whether those documents are accepted. Finally, please identify which utilities are included and provide the laundry cost and access details. Thank you.
